name: tina4_context
description: RETRIEVAL-ONLY Tina4 grounding — returns the authoritative, version-current API + real examples for your request so YOU write the code (no self-hosted generation). Prefer this over tina4_code: a strong model grounded on these exact imports/idioms produces runnable Tina4 code, where the self-hosted coder hallucinates. Pass `language` (python/php/js/nodejs/ruby).
